title: Iranian Military Shows It Knows How to Adapt, U.S. Officials Say
summary_full: Iran appears to be targeting what it views as American vulnerabilities, including air defenses meant to guard troops and assets in the region.
summary_public: Iran appears to be targeting what it views as American vulnerabilities, including air defenses meant to guard troops and assets in the region.
